description: User Wagering History - Persist and display each user's past wagers

userStories.title: Add wagers table to database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database table to store wager records so we can persist user wagers across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates a `wagers` table with id, userId, amount, outcome, createdAt
Foreign key constraint to users table
Index on userId for query performance

userStories.title: Add wager creation server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a server action to create a new wager so the UI can submit wagers.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover the happy path and validation errors

userStories.title: Build wager history list UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my past wagers in a list so I can review my activity.
acceptanceCriteria: List shows last 50 wagers, newest first
Each row shows amount, outcome, and date
Empty state when no wagers exist
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
